overview.title: summary
overview.text: This tool visualize searchable routes in the deck using "Small Worlds". It also displays cards that can alternate between the specified cards.
overview.text2: If you have any requests for additional features or questions, please comment on this article.
overview.tweetDescription: This tool visualize routes that can be searched in Small World.

usage.title: Usage
usage.text: Enter a monster card name in the "Add Monster" field, and list of monster cards will be displayed. Click the "Add" button to add the monster card.

addMonster.title: Add Monster
addMonster.text: Enter a partial card name, and list of monster cards will be displayed. Click the "Add" button to add the deck.

deck.title: Deck
deck.text: Cards added to the deck display here.
deck.tweetDescription: This tool visualize routes that can be searched in Small World.

relayMonster.title: Relay Card Search
relayMonster.text: Search relay cards that can alternate between the specified cards.
relayMonster.text2: Enter keywords to narrow down. (e.x. "dragon tuner")

graph.title: Graph
graph.text: If it is hard to see, drag vertex.

patternTable.title: Searchable List
patternTable.text: Uncheck if you want to limit the pattern.
